titleStmt.title: SII 34.412: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 412. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 14th year, Mithuna, badi 13, Monday, Rōhiṇi = A.D. 1230, June 10, Monday.

The trustees of Kuṟaḻmāṇīśvaram temple in Iḍattuvaḷi in Cheṅgāṭṭirukkai in Veṇpu-nāḍu sold a tank with its cultivable land to Ulagasamaiñjitaṉ a resident of Sīvallavaṉ-perunderu alias Dēsiyāsiriya-paṭṭaṇam, which was a part of the village, with the condition that the purchaser had to measure out a fixed quantity of paddy to the temple of Viṉāyagapiḷḷaiyār in the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟapanmaṉ tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu va
ḻaṅkiyaruḷiya cīcuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu mi
tuṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattut tiraiyōtaciyun tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa Urōcaṇi nāḷ veṇpuṇāṭṭuc ceṅkāṭṭirukkai Iṭattuvaḷi U
ṭaiyār kuṟaḻmāṇīccuvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkōyiṟ patipāta mūlappaṭṭuṭai
p pañcācāriyarōm Ivvūṟ cīvallavaṉ perunteruvāṉa tēciyāciriya paṭṭaṇat
tu Araicūruṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ kāriyāṉa Ulaka camaiñcitaṉukku nāṅkaḷ caṇ
ṭēcuvara vilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷamāvatu Ivvūr viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār Eṭu
ttatu valiya piḷḷaiyār tēvatāṉañ ciṟumaṇkuḷattukkuc cūḻellaikkuk kīḻel
lai nilaitāṅkiyēri nīrnilaikku mēṟku nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku mēṟkum teṉṉellai
pāṟaiyil kalluralukkum nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakkum mēlellai
Ikkuḷattu nīrnakkalukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Uṭaiyār kuṟaḷmāṇīccuvara
muṭaiya nāyaṉār tēvatāṉam periya maṇkuḷattu Ellaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ
kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nīrnilamum puṉceyyum Ikkuḷattu nattamum nattappāḻuṅ kuḷamuṅ
kuḷapparappum mēṉōkkiya maramuṅ kīṇōkkiya kiṇaṟu maṟṟum Eppērpaṭṭaṉavum vilai
kkuṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu caṇṭēcuvaravilaip piramāṇam paṇṇik
kuṭuttōm patipātamūla paṭṭuṭaip paiñcācāriyarōm Ulacamaiñcitaṟku Ippa
ṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷattil nilattukkum puṉceykkum payir pārttup payir nilattuk
ku patiṉaṟucāṇ kōlāl māttāl Ivvūṟ miṭikaik kālāl Aḷakkun nellu nāṟkala
mum puṉcekku Ikkāl māttāl patiṉāṟu mēṉi kāṟ tiramamum Iṟuppārākavum Ippaṭi
payiṟ koṇṭa nilattāluḷḷa nellu kaṟ pataṟ cettai muḷai maṭi vāḷ vāci nīkki Iṉṉāya
ṉār cīpaṇṭārattilēy Iṭṭaḷantu Ippaṭi Aḷanta nellukkun tiramattukkun taravukoḷvā
ṉākavum Ippaṭi cammatittuc caṇṭēccuvarap peruvilaiyākap piramāṇam paṇṇikku
ṭuttōm Iṉṉāyaṉāṟ kōyil patipāta mūlapaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyarōm Ulaka ca
maiñcitarku Iva
kaḷ collavum Aru
ḷic ceyaṟpaṭiyum
Ittirumalaiyil I
kkalveṭṭu Eḻut
tu veṭṭinēṉ Ik
kōyikāṇi Uṭaiya
kaṟtaccaṉ pirānpē
ran Āna Aḻakiya tēva
ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.412 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
